ddls:
CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the layer, must be '2.0' */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer's purpose or contents */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Technology domain that this layer represents */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if this field is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value if not present */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the layer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the layer (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the layer */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for compliance and auditing purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain (e.g., enterprise, mobile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the domain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the domain */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the domain (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the layer the filter belongs to */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., IP, MAC, user-agent) */,
  "filter_value" TEXT /* Value associated with the filter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this filter does */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the filter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the filter */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the filter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the filter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filters_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filters_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department within the organization */,
  "position" TEXT /* User's position within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer being accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer associated with the configuration */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layer_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer associated with this version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the layer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when this version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layer_versions_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layer_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this API key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The actual API key string */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the API key */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the API key (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the feedback is related to */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments or suggestions */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was resolved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)
